name: TI-IOC Match - IPv4  Addresses
conditions_text: when the event QID is one of the following (62250129) Denied, (20257872) Firewall Deny
TD_list: APPLY TI-IOC Match - IPv4  Addresses on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND NOT when the event QID is one of the following (62250129) Denied, (20257872) Firewall Deny
RED_list: Event name: TI-IOC Match - IPv4  Addresses
Event description: Identify traffic to/from known malicious IPs (e.g., command and control servers, botnets).
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
Include detected events by "Source IP" from this point forward, in the offense, for 300 second(s)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
